title: biscutella frutescens
intro: Biscutella frutescens, also known as Cornish marble-cress, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Biscutella frutescens include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Biscutella frutescens is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
